center.name: Otto Finsch
center.summary: Otto Finsch是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联4种鸟类，包括Eastern long-tailed hornbill、Brown sicklebill、Garnet robin等4种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The yellow tufted pipit or African rock pipit (Anthus crenatus) is a small-sized, passerine bird that is native to South Africa and Lesotho

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The brown sicklebill (Epimachus meyeri) is a species of bird-of-paradise that is found in the mountain forests of New Guinea

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The eastern long-tailed hornbill (Horizocerus cassini) is a species of bird in the hornbill family Bucerotidae found in humid forests of West Africa

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The garnet robin (Eugerygone rubra) is a species of bird in the family Petroicidae
